svg.title: Navigation estimation and closed-loop robustness comparison
svg.text: Navigation Estimation in the Landing Loop
Alpha-beta state estimates drive corridor guidance through flight-like throttle and TVC actuators.
Nominal RMS errors: x 0.40 m, z 0.32 m, vx 0.10 m/s, vz 0.51 m/s, pitch 0.056 deg.
